name: Chogajip Korean Restaurant
tagline: Open until 4am every single day — the chive pancakes and kimchi stew are why Honolulu's night owls know exactly where to end up.
parking: Small shared lot off Kapiolani Blvd; street parking on side streets
talkStory: A Kapiolani Blvd fixture for over two decades, Chogajip is the unofficial canteen of Honolulu's restaurant and bar industry — the place chefs and bartenders go after their own kitchens close. Open daily 8am to 4am, the 2am crowd is its own subculture of night-shift workers, post-club survivors, and insomniacs craving kimchi jjigae. The chive pancakes (buchujeon) are crispy-edged perfection at any hour. No frills, fluorescent lights, and exactly right.
